source.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America

claim_chain: Normative models depend on generalizability across diverse populations
Overrepresentation of white individuals raises concerns about inclusiveness
Race-neutral models trained on multiethnic samples can generalize across diverse populations
CentileBrain models achieved consistent accuracy across ethnoracial groups
Race-neutral approach offers pragmatic and scientifically robust strategy
Findings support continued development of inclusive modeling platforms

typical_pattern: Contextualization of the problem or gap
Description of methodological approach or rationale

likely_priorities: Representation and diversity in training datasets
Methodological rigor in handling race and ancestry
Handling of social and environmental determinants
likely_attacks: Training sample still skewed toward white individuals
Comparative analysis limited to single platform
Absence of contextual variables as covariates
reviewer_preference_profile.inference_basis: The paper explicitly acknowledges several limitations: the training sample was skewed toward individuals identifying as white, some ethnoracial subgroups remain unrepresented due to data unavailability, and the comparative analysis was limited to a single platform. The authors also defend their decision not to include contextual variables such as childhood adversity or socioeconomic status as covariates, and explain why they avoided analyses predicting ethnoracial groups from brain morphometry. These self-defenses suggest anticipated reviewer concerns about sample composition, representativeness, scope of validation, and the handling of social determinants.

These findings help address a critical gap in the normative modeling literature

verification_status.notes: All extracted phrases are literal substrings from the input text. No external references, author names, or invented numbers were included. The profile is based entirely on the provided abstract, discussion, and figure legends.
